pgpMigration.inProgress.title: Securing your account
pgpMigration.inProgress.description: We're upgrading your encryption to seed-derived keys and safely re-encrypting your data. This happens only once — please keep the app open.
pgpMigration.success.title: All set!
pgpMigration.success.description: Your account now uses seed-derived encryption keys. Your data has been re-encrypted and preserved.
